policy: Do not use sources that produced opening/fatal errors, except BIG08's CLOCK model error which is allowed as a known component-model issue rather than a container/source failure.

cleaned_replacements.reason: metal detector control also produced VGDVC.DLL access violation

do_not_use_sources.name: MT04_DSN_four_resistors_NO_CDB_FILE
do_not_use_sources.reason: Fatal ISIS.DLL error; proves ROOT.CDB must exist

do_not_use_sources.name: BIG04_metal_detector_pic_lcd_empty_cdb / metal_detector.pdsprj
do_not_use_sources.reason: VGDVC.DLL access violation; control also failed

do_not_use_sources.name: BIG10_hybrid_home_theater_dsn_clock_cdb
do_not_use_sources.reason: Generated hybrid failed while control opened; foreign CDB unsafe

do_not_use_sources.name: DLDLab13 / DLD-Proteus family
do_not_use_sources.reason: Repeated ISIS issues in later generated packs; avoid until separately isolated

allowed_with_caution.name: BIG08 JK/DLD clock-related source
allowed_with_caution.reason: Only CLOCK model error, same in control/test; not treated as project-container failure

allowed_with_caution.name: ENA analog files
allowed_with_caution.reason: Visual/opening worked but empty-CDB test had simulation/model issue; use for visual/corpus only unless model metadata preserved
